Endurant|desc: The character's maximum RP is 6 instead of 5 like other races.
Instinct de survie|desc: When an attack would bring the character to 0 HP, the DMG it deals is halved (minimum 1).
Lumière des étoiles|desc: For the character, the darkness of night under starlight is only dim light, where only fine details escape them.
Vision dans le noir|desc: In total darkness, the character sees as in dim light up to 30 m.
